description:
Feel free to suggest variations, i restrained the problem to what i think are common moves. In trying to solve the pb as stated in the introduction, keep in mind the whole board aspect, some "correct" solutions are marked false since they give too much to the opponent.
Please try it more than once has multiple response are proposed for white.
